detail: All timestamps in ISO 8601 format with Z suffix (e.g. 2026-05-25T14:30:00Z). No NaN or undefined values found.
All DLQ entries use ISO 8601 with +00:00 timezone (e.g. 2026-05-25T18:45:12+00:00). created_at and updated_at both valid.
oldest_pending and newest_entry timestamps valid ISO 8601. No NaN in any stats field.
All progress percentages are valid numbers (0.0 to 100.0). No NaN or undefined.
All confidence scores are valid numbers (0.0 to 100.0). No NaN or undefined.
grep -c NaN mission_control.json = 0. Zero NaN strings found.
grep -c NaN dead_letter_queue.json = 0. Zero NaN strings found.
grep -c undefined mission_control.json = 0. Zero undefined strings found.
grep -c undefined dead_letter_queue.json = 0. Zero undefined strings found.
No debug output visible on public-facing pages. WP_DEBUG/WP_DEBUG_DISPLAY/WP_DEBUG_LOG/SCRIPT_DEBUG should all be false - host-level wp-config.php confirmation recommended from site owner.
